hero.name: Julio Lemos
hero.title: Mid-Level QA Engineer
hero.description: Specialized in manual and automated testing, ensuring quality and reliability of web applications. Experienced with Playwright, Cypress, Selenium, and modern QA tools.

about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: I'm a QA Engineer with experience in ensuring web application quality through manual and automated testing. I work with agile methodologies and have a proactive approach to problem identification.
about.paragraph2: My experience includes testing in Banking as a Service (BaaS) environments, integration validation through network log analysis, and development of automated test suites that significantly reduced execution time.
about.paragraph3: I have expertise in JavaScript and Python, as well as experience with modern automation tools and REST APIs. I constantly seek to improve processes and contribute to product stability.

manual.title: Manual Testing
manual.description: Detailed validation of features and user flows

automation.title: Test Automation
automation.description: Script development with Playwright, Cypress, and Selenium

api.title: API Testing
api.description: Integration testing and validation with Postman and Swagger
